title: Real Personal Income: A Trend We Are Watching

title: Oil Prices and the Economy: Forecast, Consumer Risk, and Inflation Impact
summary: Clients have been asking a lot of questions about oil prices and their economic impact lately. Where are prices headed? How will consumers handle the shock of higher energy costs? title: Building the law of abundance
summary:
An emerging movement known as “the Abundance Agenda” or “the State Capacity Movement” is drawing attention to how lackluster government performance underwrites a host of problems in the United States, ranging from crumbling infrastructure to inadequate housing to rampant tax evasion.
The post Building the law of abundance appeared first on Niskanen Center.

title: Evaluation as due process: Civil Service in an automated age
summary:

title: The Quiet Operational Advantage
summary: At ITR Economics, we stress that preparation — not reaction — rewards businesses.When growth is mild and margins tighten, strong leaders need to focus on the fundamentals that can quietly erode profitability when ignored.
relevance_reason: Подчеркивает важность подготовки и фундаментальных показателей бизнеса, что является практической рекомендацией в условиях неопределенности.

title: What We’re Seeing in Consumer Trends
summary: Consumer spending accounts for roughly two-thirds of US GDP. As the consumer goes, so goes the broader economy.
relevance_reason: Анализ потребительских трендов критически важен для понимания динамики экономики, особенно в контексте прогнозируемого снижения спроса.

title: Growth Can Return While Profitability Lags
summary: That is the reality many leaders face when costs remain elevated and pricing power is limited. ITR Economics has been warning that the 2020s may include periods of profitless prosperity — where top-line growth is achievable, but margins are compressed by labor, materials, interest rates, and other structural pressures.
relevance_reason: Обсуждает 'прибыльную, но бесприбыльную' экономику, что отражает проблемы с рентабельностью и сжатием маржи, связанные с долговым циклом и инфляцией.

title: Business Investment a Constructive Signal Despite Uncertainty
summary: Recent data show a notable rise in business investment, suggesting that firms are still committing resources toward productive capacity. US Capital Goods New Orders are in in an accelerating growth trend, coming in at 14.9% above the year-ago level in November 2025.
